title: Python Developer Intern
description: We are looking for a motivated Python Developer Intern to join our growing team. You will work on real-world projects using Python, Django, and SQL. This is a great opportunity to learn and grow in a startup environment.

title: Backend Developer
description: Join our backend team to build scalable financial services. You'll work with Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, and Redis. Experience with microservices architecture is a plus.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: We need a Full Stack Developer to build our learning platform. You'll work with React, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS. Experience with educational technology is preferred.

title: AI Engineer Intern
description: Exciting opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI projects. You'll help build machine learning models using Python, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. Strong interest in AI/ML required.

title: Data Analyst Intern
description: Join our data analytics team to analyze business data and create insights. You'll use Python, Pandas, and SQL to work with large datasets.

title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Work on real ML projects in a fast-paced startup environment. You'll learn about model training, deployment, and monitoring using Python and scikit-learn.

title: Software Engineer Fresher
description: Great opportunity for freshers to start their career in software development. You'll work on Java Spring Boot applications and learn enterprise development practices.

title: DevOps Intern
description: Learn DevOps practices and tools in a real cloud environment. You'll work with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Create beautiful and responsive user interfaces for our clients. You'll work with React, TypeScript, and modern CSS frameworks.

title: Cloud Engineer Intern
description: Get hands-on experience with cloud platforms and infrastructure as code. You'll work with AWS, Terraform, and Kubernetes.

title: Python Developer
description: Build scalable web applications using Python and Django. Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis is required. Knowledge of AWS is a plus.

title: Data Science Intern
description: Work on predictive modeling and data visualization projects. You'll use Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib to analyze data and build models.

title: React Developer
description: Build modern React applications with Next.js and TypeScript. Experience with state management and API integration is required.

title: Java Developer Fresher
description: Start your career in enterprise Java development. You'll work on Spring Boot applications and learn best practices in software development.

title: Database Administrator Intern
description: Learn database administration and optimization. You'll work with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB to manage and optimize database performance.

title: Mobile App Developer Intern
description: Develop mobile applications using React Native or Flutter. You'll work on cross-platform apps and learn mobile development best practices.

title: Software Testing Intern
description: Learn software testing methodologies and automation. You'll work with Selenium, Jest, and CI/CD pipelines to ensure software quality.

title: Cybersecurity Intern
description: Get introduced to cybersecurity concepts and practices. You'll learn about network security, vulnerability assessment, and security tools.

title: API Developer
description: Design and build robust RESTful APIs using Python FastAPI or Node.js Express. Experience with API documentation and testing is required.

title: Blockchain Developer Intern
description: Explore blockchain technology and smart contract development. You'll work with Solidity, Web3, and learn about decentralized applications.
